title: Get Change Artifact
description: Monaco needs file bytes plus the hash for the next save, but HTTP delivery must stay thin. `GetChangeArtifact` wraps repository reads with the same tracked-file confinement as save so handlers never reach into `ChangeRepository` ad hoc.
context: Monaco needs file bytes plus the hash for the next save, but HTTP delivery must stay thin. `GetChangeArtifact` wraps repository reads with the same tracked-file confinement as save so handlers never reach into `ChangeRepository` ad hoc.

rules: Within `ChangeRepository.mutate`, the use case MUST load the change and call `artifact(change, filename)`, returning `{ content, originalHash }` or a typed not-found error.
The same tracked-file guard as `SaveChangeArtifact` MUST apply: untracked filenames MUST fail before read.

scenarios.name: Tracked file returns content and hash
given: proposal.md is tracked on change foo

scenarios.name: Read uses ChangeRepository.mutate
then: AND HTTP handler does not call repository directly
